payload.input: You’re going to slide right in, Ethan, you’re going to feel how hot and tight your sister is, and I’m going to be right here, holding you, making sure you don’t go too fast and hurt yourself."  She positions his crown at Maya’s entrance, the heat of them meeting making Ethan gasp, his hips jerking involuntarily in Vivian’s grip. She holds him steady, her other hand coming up to grip his hipbone, her thumb pressing into the hollow there with a possessive weight. "Slow," she commands, her voice thick with the effort of restraint, her own arousal a damp patch spreading across the front of her camisole. "Push forward just a little, feel her open up, that’s it, oh god, Ethan, look at you, look at you disappearing inside her."  Ethan pushes, his face contorting with the overwhelming sensation of wet heat gripping him for the first time, and Maya cries out, her back arching off the mattress, her hands flying to his shoulders and digging in hard enough to leave crescent marks. He’s only halfway in, his length disproportionate to his frame, and already he’s shaking so hard that Vivian has to hold him upright, her arms wrapped around his chest from behind, her chin digging into his shoulder as she watches him sink deeper.
